title: PPIP - Share data button presented after log out
scenario: Share Data toggle disappears from App Settings > General > Account after logging in with Poly credentials
steps: 2. If not already logged in, complete onboarding and set the 'Share Data' toggle to ON or OFF as desired.
3. Navigate to Home → Account → App Settings → General → Account.
4. Observe the 'Share Data' toggle is present and reflects the choice made during onboarding.
5. Log out of the app via Account settings.
6. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
7. Verify the 'Share Data' toggle is still present and its ON/OFF state correctly reflects the user's initial choice.
8. Log back into the app using valid Poly credentials.
9. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
expected: The 'Share Data' toggle should remain visible in App Settings > General > Account after logging in with Poly credentials, and its ON/OFF state should continue to reflect the user's initial choice made during onboarding.
